An ACA that got trapped in the city, good service only at YPF

reviews.comment:
Bien. Sólo cargué combustible.

(Translated by Google)
Okay. I just filled up with fuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16461763455653012667/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJNk1yR3ZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Tardan mucho en atender, las colas se hacen muy largas y quedan los autos en la calle esperando. Después de eso, muy buena atención. A veces se les cae el sistema y no te cargan los puntos de la ServiClub.

(Translated by Google)
They take a long time to serve you, the lines get very long, and cars are left waiting on the street. After that, the service is very good. Sometimes their system crashes, and they don't credit your ServiClub points.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16461763455653012667/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJZ3A2MzF3RRAB
